Mastermind Expert Collaboration with Bas Wouters | session 1
The Most Difficult Thing About Influence Is Knowing Exactly What You Want to Influence
Prepare for Mastermind Collaboration Session 1! Following the successful initial Live Teaching Session, it's time to design your
influence challenges alongside your peers. Don't tackle these hurdles alone; join forces to solve problems together. Seize the
opportunity for global networking to expand your connections.
